alpn_policy.description: The ALPN policy which specifies the protocol negotiation for the listener.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the listener.

certificate_arn.description: The ARN of the SSL certificate associated with the listener.

default_action.description: The default action that the listener takes when handling incoming requests.

id.description: The unique ID of the listener.

load_balancer_arn.description: The ARN of the load balancer to which the listener is attached.

mutual_authentication.description: Settings related to mutual TLS authentication for the listener.

port.description: The port on which the listener is listening for connections.

protocol.description: The protocol (HTTP or HTTPS) used by the listener.

ssl_policy.description: The SSL policy that defines the ciphers and protocols for the listener.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the listener.
